creator: jmallett@newgold.net
text:
http://www.freebsd.org/support.html's link to a FAQ question related to IRC points to a non-existing page anchor, shold probably link to the #IRC anchor. Additionally, adding the #FreeBSD/irc.openprojects.net channel might be good, as it tends to be fairly active.

Fix: 

Link to #IRC rather than #AEN20 in http://www.freebsd.org/support.html#irc for 'the FAQ entry'.
How-To-Repeat: Go to http://www.freebsd.org/support.html and click on the link for the FAQ question related to IRC. Teh current link doesn't even point to the right answer number.
